Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS J & M GALVEZ, INC., JUAN GALVEZ, AND MIGUEL GALVEZ'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' demurrers to the first amended complaint (FAC) are sustained in part and overruled in part.

Misrepresentations must be pled with specificity - "how, when, where, to whom, and by what means the representations were tendered." (Stansfield v. Starkey (1990) 220 Cal.App.3d 59, 73.) This the FAC does not do, so the demurrers to the fourth and sixth causes of action are sustained with leave to amend.

Alter ego is adequately pled, but mislabeled a "cause of action." This is of no moment, so the demurrer to the seventh cause of action is overruled. (See Quelimane Co. v. Stewart Title Guaranty Co. (1998) 19 Cal.4th 26, 38-39.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
